'''Vester''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] who served as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Vengeance (Imperial-class, Jerec)|Vengeance]] [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] and ferried [[Brazack]]'s [[Ghost Battalion]] onto [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] in their mission to bring to Jerec [[Morgan Katarn]] alive.

Vester piloted a [[Light freighter/Legends|Corellian light freighter]] camouflaged as an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ship. He used its weapons to kill the [[Danga family]], then moved on against the [[Katarn family compound|Katarn homestead]]. He delivered Brazack's [[Commando/Legends|commandoes]] to storm into the house, and continued his flight northward to inflict even more damage, with orders to provide cover if needed. He then picked up the team back to the ''Vengeance'', covered by a flight of 5 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]].

The commandoes failed to locate Katarn and Jerec organized a more severe attack. Imperial forces attacked the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]] defended by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] on Sulon and Vester carried the commandoes to that place. [[Trol]] attempted to hit the ship with a [[SLM]] but Vester had raised the angle of the ship so that the missile hit only the underside, and Vester managed to steady it again. The Rebels didn't have time to fire a second missile, and soon Vester unloaded Brazack and his commandoes.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
